sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, a String, b Float64, c Nullable(Int32));
SELECT theilsU(CAST(a AS Int32), b OR (c IS NULL) AS flag FROM test_table GROUP BY flag HAVING flag;
SELECT theilsU(SELECT MAX(a) FROM test_table WHERE c IS NOT NULL), (ANY(c) IS NOT NULL OR COUNT(c)=0) AS has_nulls FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT DISTINCT a, NULLIF(b, 0) AS b FROM test_table;
SELECT theilsU(a, b*4) FROM (SELECT id, a, b FROM temp_table) WHERE (b IS NOT NULL OR a = '1' OR c = 300) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT theilsU(SELECT AVG(c) FROM test_table GROUP BY a), (c > 100 OR a = '3') AS test_flag FROM test_table;
SELECT a, b, theilsU(a, CAST(c AS Float64)) FROM test_table WHERE a LIKE '1%' OR (c IS NULL AND b < 1) GROUP BY a, b;
